title: Amethyst Sword
description: Add the amethyst sword to your world.
body:
## Amethyst Sword

A sword made from amethyst shards, stronger than diamond and great for combat.


## Features

1. Crafted from amethyst shards and a stick
2. Usable in survival mode
3. Balanced between speed and high damage


## Stats

1. **Damage:** 7.5 (higher than diamond’s 7)
2. **Attack Speed:** 1.6
3. **Durability:** 1,561
4. **Enchantability:** 10


## Crafting

**Recipe:**

1. 2x Amethyst Shard
2. 1x Stick

## Tips

1. Strong weapon for late-game combat (before netherite)


## Also
first mod of mine so expect more content in the future
